raw_consumer_statement:
I stayed at the XXXX XXXX hotel on XXXX XXXX XXXX, using a reservation paid ENTIRELY with XXXX XXXX points XXXX No cash payment was required for my stay. At check-in, the hotel took my American Express card for a standard damage/incidental hold only. 
After checkout, I discovered the hotel charged approximately XXXX XXXX  to my credit card without my authorization. These charges were not for any services I received or damages I caused. The hotel has provided no itemization or justification for these charges. 
I disputed these unauthorized charges with American Express, providing clear evidence that : My reservation was a complete XXXX points redemption ( confirmation attached ) The XXXX XXXX charge was never authorized No services or damages warranted any charges American Express denied my dispute, incorrectly siding with the merchant despite proof that my room was already paid in full with XXXX points. They are failing to protect me from what is clearly an unauthorized charge. The hotel converted a temporary hold into an actual charge without any valid basis. 
This is a clear violation of cardholder protections. A points-paid stay should result in ZERO room charges on my credit card.
